pageContext.name: Young-hee Doll
pageContext.description: The shocking Young-hee doll from the first episode of the smash-hit Netflix series Squid Game joins TAMASHII Lab! Featuring a motorized rotating head, and replaying key sounds and lines, it lets you re-create the 'Red Light, Green Light' game on your tabletop! Accurately sculpted to capture its onscreen appearance, it even features an eye-color-changing gimmick for added realism!
